arts.ttl: Manchester United could hand first-team debuts to two players everyone is talking about
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Barnsley in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday and two youngsters could make their full debuts.

arts.ttl: Chelsea treatment shows why Ten Hag lost Sancho at Man Utd
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca could be the man to get the best out of Jadon Sancho after his impressive Chelsea debut, leaving Erik ten Hag rueing the way things turned out for the player at Manchester United . Maresca is understood to have told Sancho that he has a clean slate and that there will be no looking back on his time at Old Trafford, giving the forward a clean break from Ten Hag to help him revitalise his career with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: 'It's beneficial for Chelsea, Arsenal, Liverpool, Man Utd for Man City to look bad': City expert reacts to 115 charges hearing
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany admits to Sports Mole that it is beneficial for Premier League clubs including Chelsea, Arsenal, Liverpool and Man United for the Citizens to "look bad" amidst the 115 charges against them.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reflects on new Man Utd selection 'headache'
arts.sum: "So, I hope I have many players available and we can make a selection from game to game. I hope I have headaches because, last year, I also had headaches, but there were no players available.

arts.ttl: Manager launches defence of Manchester United loanee after claim youngster was 'struggling'
arts.sum: Man United's Joe Hugill joined Wigan on a season-long loan deal in the summer and he's been in great form.

arts.ttl: 'The new Martin Odegaard' warned off Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: However, Nypan was told that moving to United at his age would be a ‘bad idea’, with Norweigen pundit Yaw Amankwah advising the midfielder to only leave Rosenborg for a club where he will regularly play and continue his development. “When I hear names like Manchester United, I think it would be a bad idea,” Amankwah told TV 2 .

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Manchester United playing in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Manchester United did not finish in the top 4 of the Premier League last season. The new-look Champions League kicks off this week and despite the flashy new graphics, revamped logo, fresh ball and a completely different style of tournament, Manchester United still aren’t in the WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Eight players could miss Manchester United's Carabao Cup tie vs Barnsley
arts.sum: The latest injury news from Man Utd before their Carabao Cup third round tie against Barnsley at Old Trafford on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag issues advice to 'impatient' Man Utd star in hint on his dream line-up
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has spoken about out-of-favour forward Antony, who has featured only once for Manchester United so far this season, as a late substitute in last month’s 2-1 Premier League loss at Brighton

arts.ttl: 'I'm waiting' - Forgotten Manchester United player could make first appearance of the season
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Altay Bayindir has made just one appearance for Man United since joining the club last summer.
